DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-08-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Via Zoom Conference
Narek Garibyan, Esq., SAUNDERS & ASSOCIATES, APC, (951) 272-9114 gary@saundersapc.com for Plaintiffs Camilla Adriano and Gosia Leszczynska
Dennis Kelley, Esq., DILLINGHAM & MURPHY, LLP, (415) 397-2700 djk@dillinghammurphy.com for Defendant eXp Realty of California, Inc.

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT EXP REALTY OF CALIFORNIA, INC. DEMURRER to COMPLAINT

Defendant eXp Realty of California, Inc.'s demurrer to the complaint to which no opposition or response was filed is SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. Defendant's demurrer to the entire Complaint as to it is sustained, as is Defendant's demurrer to the Second, Fourth, Fifth and Tenth causes of action as to Defendant. Plaintiffs have not requested leave to amend or demonstrated a reasonable possibility they can state a viable cause of action against Defendant and, therefore, leave to amend is not granted.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JMQ)
